title: Apply professional design upgrade to the entire application

requirements.text: Redesign the entire application with a professional, polished visual identity suitable for a healthcare/skincare platform. Upgrade typography to use a professional font stack (e.g., Inter, System UI, or similar modern sans-serif), increase font weights for headings, improve line heights and letter spacing for readability, and ensure consistent hierarchy across all pages.

quotes: design it as a proffessional one

acceptanceCriteria: All pages use a cohesive professional font stack with appropriate weights
Typography hierarchy is clear and consistent throughout the application
Line heights and spacing enhance readability
Headings use appropriate font sizes and weights to establish clear visual hierarchy

requirements.text: Enhance the color palette to create a more sophisticated and professional appearance. Refine the healthcare-inspired soft greens and whites to include deeper accent tones, professional neutrals (grays), and ensure sufficient contrast ratios for accessibility. Apply consistent color usage for interactive elements (buttons, links, badges) across all components.

quotes: design it as a proffessional one

acceptanceCriteria: Color palette includes refined professional tones with proper contrast
All interactive elements have consistent hover and active states
Colors meet WCAG accessibility standards for contrast
Badge colors for safety classifications maintain professional appearance while being distinguishable

requirements.text: Upgrade card components throughout the application with refined shadows, borders, and spacing. Apply subtle elevation effects, rounded corners, and appropriate padding to create a clean, professional card-based layout. Ensure consistent styling across ProductCard, IngredientCard, ArticleCard, and all other card components.

quotes: design it as a proffessional one

acceptanceCriteria: All card components have consistent shadow depth and border radius
Cards have appropriate padding and spacing between elements
Hover states include smooth transitions and subtle elevation changes
Card layouts are visually balanced and professional

requirements.text: Improve button design across the application with professional styling including refined padding, font weights, hover effects, and loading states. Ensure primary, secondary, and tertiary button variants are clearly differentiated. Add smooth transitions and professional micro-interactions to all interactive elements.

quotes: design it as a proffessional one

acceptanceCriteria: All buttons have consistent sizing, padding, and border radius
Button variants (primary, secondary, ghost) are clearly distinguishable
Hover and active states include smooth transitions
Loading states are professional and visually polished
Disabled states are clearly indicated with appropriate opacity

requirements.text: Enhance form inputs, textareas, and search fields with professional styling including refined borders, focus states, placeholder text styling, and validation feedback. Apply consistent input height, padding, and error message styling across all form components including Questionnaire, IngredientAnalysis, ProductSuitabilityChecker, and search bars.

quotes: design it as a proffessional one

acceptanceCriteria: All form inputs have consistent styling with refined borders and focus states
Placeholder text uses appropriate opacity and professional tone
Validation errors display with clear, professional messaging
Focus states include smooth transitions and visible indicators
Input fields maintain professional appearance across all pages

requirements.text: Upgrade the Layout header navigation with a more professional appearance including refined spacing, hover effects, active link indicators, and mobile-responsive behavior. Ensure the logo area, navigation links, and LoginButton are visually balanced and professional.

quotes: design it as a proffessional one

acceptanceCriteria: Header navigation has refined spacing and professional typography
Navigation links include smooth hover effects and active indicators
Mobile menu is well-designed and easy to use
Logo and branding elements are prominently and professionally displayed
Sticky header behavior is smooth and polished

requirements.text: Refine the LandingPage hero section with a more professional and engaging layout. Improve heading typography, refine the ProductSearchBar styling, enhance call-to-action button prominence, and ensure the features section uses professional iconography and layout.

quotes: design it as a proffessional one

acceptanceCriteria: Hero section has professional typography with clear visual hierarchy
ProductSearchBar is prominently styled with professional appearance
Call-to-action buttons are visually prominent and polished
Feature cards use consistent professional styling
Overall landing page conveys trust and professionalism

requirements.text: Enhance the Dashboard page with professional data visualization including refined statistics cards, improved progress indicators, and polished layout. Ensure AnalysisHistory, ProgressTracker, and ReminderCard components have cohesive professional styling.

quotes: design it as a proffessional one

acceptanceCriteria: Statistics cards have professional styling with clear metrics display
Progress indicators and trend charts are visually polished
Analysis history cards have refined typography and spacing
Overall dashboard layout is clean and professional
Empty states are professionally designed with clear guidance

requirements.text: Upgrade the DBMSDocumentationPage with a refined academic report design including professional section headers, improved code syntax highlighting, refined diagram presentation, and polished typography suitable for formal documentation export.

quotes: design it as a proffessional one

acceptanceCriteria: Documentation page uses professional academic report styling
Section headers are clearly hierarchical and well-spaced
Code blocks have professional syntax highlighting
Diagrams are well-integrated with appropriate sizing and spacing
Typography is suitable for formal documentation and PDF export
PDFExportButton is prominently and professionally styled

requirements.text: Improve spacing, margins, and padding consistency across all pages and components. Apply professional whitespace management to create breathing room, improve readability, and establish clear visual groupings. Ensure consistent section spacing on all pages.

quotes: design it as a proffessional one

acceptanceCriteria: All pages have consistent spacing between sections
Component padding is uniform and professional
Whitespace is effectively used to improve readability
Related elements are visually grouped with appropriate spacing
Overall layout feels balanced and uncluttered

requirements.text: Add professional loading states, skeleton screens, and transitions throughout the application. Replace basic loading spinners with polished loading indicators, implement smooth page transitions, and add subtle animations to enhance the professional feel without being distracting.

quotes: design it as a proffessional one

acceptanceCriteria: Loading states use professional skeleton screens or refined spinners
Page transitions are smooth and polished
Animations are subtle and enhance user experience
Loading indicators are contextual and well-placed
All transitions maintain the professional aesthetic

constraints: Maintain the existing healthcare-inspired soft green color theme as the base palette while refining it
Preserve all existing functionality and component behavior
Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, useInternetIdentity.tsx, useActor.ts, main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Ensure all design changes are responsive and work across mobile, tablet, and desktop viewports
Maintain accessibility standards (WCAG AA minimum) for all design changes
nonGoals: Changing the core color scheme from healthcare-inspired greens and whites
Modifying backend logic or data structures
Changing the application architecture or routing structure
Redesigning the fundamental layout structure of existing pages
